findings.evidence: Lines 524-526 document `def trans`; the proof claim is then implemented in `isHomeomorph_total'` at lines 528-534.
findings.fix: Rewrite the docstring to describe only that `Φ.trans Ψ` is the ambient isotopy with time-slices `Ψ_t ∘ Φ_t`; move proof-method commentary to a non-doc comment if needed.
findings.issue: `AmbientIsotopy.trans` docstring includes proof commentary (`total map is Ψ.totalMap ∘ Φ.totalMap, hence a homeomorphism, so no gluing is needed`) rather than only documenting the operation.

findings.evidence: Lines 549-551 document `noncomputable def symm`; the construction proof appears in `isHomeomorph_total'` at lines 554-560.
findings.fix: Rewrite the docstring to describe only that `Φ.symm` has time-slices inverse to those of `Φ`; keep the homeomorphism construction detail out of the docstring.
findings.issue: `AmbientIsotopy.symm` docstring includes proof commentary (`total map is Φ.totalMap⁻¹, hence a homeomorphism`) rather than only documenting the inverse ambient isotopy.

summary: The public API is mostly documented accurately, but two new public-definition docstrings describe proof mechanics instead of just the operation/result.
